# DriftDetection

> Detected behavioral or performance drift in an agent

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| agentLabel | string | yes | - | Which agent is being monitored |
| detectionType | output-drift \| confidence-drift \| latency-drift \| cost-drift \| behavior-drift | yes | - | Type of drift detected |
| severity | critical \| high \| medium \| low | yes | - | Severity level |
| baselineHash | string | yes | - | Hash of baseline behavior |
| currentHash | string | yes | - | Hash of current behavior |
| driftScore | float | yes | - | Drift score from 0 to 1 |
| sampleCount | integer | yes | - | Number of samples analyzed |
| baselinePeriod | string | yes | - | Baseline time period (e.g. "2026-02-01 to 2026-02-15") |
| currentPeriod | string | yes | - | Current time period (e.g. "2026-02-16 to 2026-02-24") |
| details | json | yes | - | Specific drift details (changed outputs, new patterns) |
| status | active \| acknowledged \| resolved \| false-positive | yes | active | Current status of this detection |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/drift-detection` — List all
- `POST /api/drift-detection` — Create
- `GET /api/drift-detection/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/drift-detection/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/drift-detection/:id` — Delete
